narrative:
North Olmsted-04-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,058 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
